HOME_HERO_DESCRIPTION: Discover a living heritage, centuries-old traditions, and a community looking toward the future.
HOME_HISTORY_DESCRIPTION: For generations, the Traditional Chiefdom of Malentouen has preserved its heritage, values and traditions while supporting the development of its community.
HOME_HISTORY_TIMELINE_TODAY_TITLE: An institution looking toward the future
HOME_CULTURE_TITLE: A living culture passed down through generations
HOME_CULTURE_DESCRIPTION: The Traditional Chiefdom of Malentouen preserves and promotes a rich cultural heritage made up of traditions, craftsmanship, dances and ceremonies that continue to unite generations.
HOME_CULTURE_TRADITIONS_DESCRIPTION: Rituals, ceremonies and customs that shape the life of the Chiefdom.
HOME_CULTURE_CRAFT_DESCRIPTION: Traditional skills preserved through sculptures, handcrafted objects and artistic creations.
HOME_CULTURE_DANCE_DESCRIPTION: Artistic expressions that tell our history, celebrate important moments and strengthen community ties.
